_meta.subject: Riso-Hudson Levels of Development (health continuum) — basis for 'current psychological health state' feature
_meta.attribution: The nine named Levels are proprietary Riso-Hudson (© The Enneagram Institute) creative expression — treat the level NAMES as short attributed quotations. The concept of a 9-level healthy/average/unhealthy continuum is the structure.
_meta.safe_for_commercial_reuse: structure=yes; the specific level NAMES are attributed EI quotations — paraphrase before publishing UI copy
_meta.verified: adversarially fact-checked by a second agent against primary sources (deepinme research workflow, 2026-07)
_meta.source: see reference/sources.md and _meta of related item files

levels.description: Riso-Hudson Levels of Development: a vertical continuum of nine Levels within each type measuring psychological health, from most free/liberated (Level 1) to most pathological (Level 9), grouped into three bands.

names.4: The Level of Imbalance / Social Role

names.8: The Level of Obsession and Compulsion
